stem:
h(x) = x² + 73

What is the minimum value of the given function?
rationale: Choice B is correct. A function of the form h(x) = a(x − h)² + k with a > 0 has its minimum value at k. Here a = 1, h = 0, k = 73, so the minimum value of h is 73. Choice A is the x-coordinate of the minimum. Choices C and D arise from calculation errors.
